# Load the provided databases
import json, re, unicodedata, math
from difflib import SequenceMatcher
from pathlib import Path

quran_path = Path("/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json")
hadith_path = Path("/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json")

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadith = json.load(f)

len(quran), len(hadith)

# Helper normalization functions for Arabic search
import regex as reg

ARABIC_DIACRITICS = reg.compile(r"[\p{M}\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]")
TATWEEL = "\u0640"

def normalize_ar(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str):
        return ""
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, "")
    s = ARABIC_DIACRITICS.sub("", s)
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace("أ","ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("آ","ا").replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ة","ه")
    # punctuation removal and spaces
    s = re.sub(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]", " ", s)
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

# Access fields
quran_ayah_texts = [x.get("ayah_text","") for x in quran]
quran_meta = quran  # keep whole dicts for indexing/refs

# For hadith, collect matn/hadithTxt
hadith_texts = []
for h in hadith:
    t = h.get("hadithTxt") or h.get("Matn") or ""
    hadith_texts.append(t)

# The given inputs
full_span = "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْر"
snippet = "وَلَقَدْ خ...حْنُ أَقْر"

norm_full = normalize_ar(full_span)
norm_full

# Search in Quran by obvious anchor phrase "ولقد خلقنا الانسان"
anchor = "ولقد خلقنا الانسان"
candidates = []
for i, ayah in enumerate(quran_ayah_texts):
    norm_ayah = normalize_ar(ayah)
    if anchor in norm_ayah or "ونحن اقرب اليه" in norm_ayah:
        # store candidate with meta
        candidates.append((i, ayah, norm_ayah))

len(candidates)

# Compute normalized similarity between the full span and each candidate
def lcs_length(a,b):
    # classic DP
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            temp = dp[j]
            if a[i-1]==b[j-1]:
                dp[j]=prev+1
            else:
                dp[j]=max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = temp
    return dp[m]

def sim_score(a,b):
    a_n = normalize_ar(a)
    b_n = normalize_ar(b)
    l = lcs_length(a_n, b_n)
    # normalize by max length to be conservative
    denom = max(len(a_n), len(b_n), 1)
    return l/denom, a_n, b_n, l, denom

scores = []
for i, ayah, _ in candidates:
    s, a_n, b_n, l, d = sim_score(full_span, ayah)
    scores.append((s, ayah))
    print(round(s,4), "->", ayah)

sorted(scores, key=lambda x: -x[0])[:3]

def sim_score_min(a,b):
    a_n = normalize_ar(a)
    b_n = normalize_ar(b)
    l = lcs_length(a_n, b_n)
    denom = min(len(a_n), len(b_n), 1)
    return l/denom, a_n, b_n, l, denom

for i, ayah, _ in candidates:
    s, *_ = sim_score_min(full_span, ayah)
    print(round(s,4), "->", ayah)

def sim_score_min(a,b):
    a_n = normalize_ar(a)
    b_n = normalize_ar(b)
    l = lcs_length(a_n, b_n)
    denom = max(min(len(a_n), len(b_n)), 1)
    return l/denom, a_n, b_n, l, denom

for i, ayah, _ in candidates:
    s, *_ = sim_score_min(full_span, ayah)
    print(round(s,4), "->", ayah)

# Find the exact dict entry for the candidate ayah (text equals)
target = None
for entry in quran:
    if entry.get("ayah_text") == "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنْسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِ نَفْسُهُ ۖ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ الْوَرِيدِ":
        target = entry
        break

target

# Extract the exact ayah text to ensure no character drift
exact_text = target["ayah_text"]
exact_text
